'''C'ar L'andara''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancing [[Gender/Legends|girl]] and a high-ranking member of the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]].

==Biography==
She began her career as a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Alexander Julstan IV]] of the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]], until she ran away. In a matter of hours, she was re-captured by [[Talas Piran]], leader of the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]]. Piran, however, decided to keep her instead of returning her, thinking that the resourceful fugitive could be a useful addition to the Council. L'andara began helping the Council in business transactions with Twi'lek slavers. Although new in the business, she showed a natural skill in a short [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
C'ar L'andara was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a supplement to ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" />
